style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="EXPOSED PORTS (From Host)<br><br>🟢 31028 → Open WebUI<br>🔴 3000 → Langfuse UI (Admin)<br>🟠 9090 → MinIO Console (Admin)<br>🟠 8123 → ClickHouse (Optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="195" width="260" x="1300" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internal" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="INTERNAL PORTS (Docker Network)<br><br>🔵 NOT exposed to host / Internet<br>• LiteLLM : 4000<br>• Ollama : 11434<br>• PostgreSQL : 5432<br>• Redis : 6379<br>• ClickHouse Native : 9000<br>• MinIO S3 API : 9000" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="215" width="260" x="1300" y="320" as="geometry" /> Internal Docker Network<br>╌╌ TCP (Database / Internal)<br>━━ HTTPS (Cloudflare only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="260" x="1300" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="notes" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 189px; margin-left: 1282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
EXPOSED PORTS (From Host)
🟢 31028 → Open WebUI
🔴 3000 → Langfuse UI (Admin)
🟠 9090 → MinIO Console (Admin)
🟠 8123 → ClickHouse (Optional)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 409px; margin-left: 1282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
INTERNAL PORTS (Docker Network)
🔵 NOT exposed to host / Internet
• LiteLLM : 4000
• Ollama : 11434
• PostgreSQL : 5432
• Redis : 6379
• ClickHouse Native : 9000
• MinIO S3 API : 9000

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 621px; margin-left: 1282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
PROTOCOLS
━━ HTTP (not encrypted)
- - - Internal Docker Network
╌╌ TCP (Database / Internal)
━━ HTTPS (Cloudflare only)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 814px; margin-left: 1282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
NOTES
• All data stays inside infrastructure
• Only Open WebUI is accessible to end users
• Observability via Langfuse
• LiteLLM centralizes routing, guardrails, logs
• Cloudflare is outside sovereign perimeter
